files.patch: @@ -1245,4 +1245,5 @@ - * the {@linkplain List#hashCode()} and {@linkplain List#toString()} methods throw - * {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}, and the {@linkplain List#equals(Object)} - * may throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException} depending on which - * elements (if any) are compared. + * the {@linkplain Object#hashCode() hashCode()} and + * {@linkplain Object#toString() toString()} methods throw + * {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}, and the {@linkplain Object#equals(Object)} + * throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException} if attempting to compare an element that + * could not be computed.

@@ -1797,4 +1797,5 @@ - * the {@linkplain Map#hashCode()} and {@linkplain Map#toString()} methods throw - * {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}, and the {@linkplain Map#equals(Object)} - * may throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException} depending on which - * entries (if any) are compared. + * the {@linkplain Object#hashCode() hashCode()} and + * {@linkplain Object#toString() toString()} methods throw + * {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}, and the {@linkplain Object#equals(Object)} + * throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException} if attempting to compare a value that + * could not be computed.

@@ -791,4 +791,5 @@ - * the {@linkplain Set#hashCode()} and {@linkplain Set#toString()} methods throw - * {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}, and the {@linkplain Set#equals(Object)} - * may throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException} depending on which - * elements (if any) are compared. + * the {@linkplain Object#hashCode() hashCode()} and + * {@linkplain Object#toString() toString()} methods throw + * {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}, and the {@linkplain Object#equals(Object)} + * throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException} if attempting to compare an element that + * could not be computed.
